name: user-tour-kit
description: AI assistant skills for adding product tours, onboarding flows, hints, checklists, in-app announcements, and feature adoption tracking to React/Next.js apps. Uses @tour-kit/* npm packages — headless, TypeScript-first, WCAG 2.1 AA, shadcn/ui-compatible. Alternative to Shepherd.js, Driver.js, Reactour, Appcues, Userpilot, and Pendo.
